without_skill_failures: Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration NuGet package
Calls AddIdentityServerConfiguration() on the service collection
Calls MapDynamicClientRegistration() to map the DCR endpoint
Mentions that DCR requires Business Edition or higher license
Configures AddJwtBearer with an Authority and Audience for the DCR scheme
Applies RequireAuthorization with the named policy to MapDynamicClientRegistration()
Creates a class that extends DynamicClientRegistrationValidator
Overrides ValidateGrantTypesAsync to reject grant types other than authorization_code
Overrides ValidateRedirectUrisAsync to enforce HTTPS on all redirect URIs
Sets RequirePkce = true in SetClientDefaultsAsync or equivalent override
Registers the validator using AddDynamicClientRegistrationValidator<T>() on the configuration builder
Overrides ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync in a DynamicClientRegistrationValidator subclass
Calls context.SetError when the software statement is missing or invalid
Maps claims from the software statement (e.g. software_name) to context.Client properties
Calls base.ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync at the end of successful validation
Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework NuGet package
Calls AddClientConfigurationStore() on the IdentityServer configuration builder
Does NOT suggest implementing IClientConfigurationStore from scratch when the EF package is available
Implements the IClientConfigurationStore interface
Calls AddIdentityServerConfiguration with options.IdentityServerBaseUrl set to 'https://identity.example.com'
Calls MapDynamicClientRegistration() with RequireAuthorization()
